query: I cannot log into my account.
final_response: It sounds like you're having trouble logging into your account. Please try using the 'Forgot Password' option on the login page. If that doesn't resolve the issue, contact our support team for further assistance. If you cannot log into your account, please use the Forgot Password option on the login page. Should the issue persist, contact support and we will verify your identity to restore access.

approved_fragments.fragment: I understand you're having trouble logging into your account. You can typically reset your password by clicking the 'Forgot Password' link on our login page. If you're still unable to access your account after trying this, please provide more details, and a human support agent will be happy to assist you after verifying your identity.
If you cannot log into your account, please use the Forgot Password option on the login page. Should the issue persist, contact support and we will verify your identity to restore access.
